raw_text:
28. Tool Development Engineer

Job Summary  
Leads the development and improvement of tools and dies for new product launches and 
process enhancements.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Develop new tools and dies based on product requirement s  
• Coordinate with design, production, and quality teams  
• Conduct feasibility studies and cost analysis  
• Oversee tool trials and validation  
• Improve tool performance and life  
• Manage tooling projects  
Required Skills  
• Strong knowledge of tooling processes  
• Project management skills  
• Analytical and problem -solving ability  
• Cross -functional coordination  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical  
Experience  
• 4–8 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹40,000 – ₹80,000 per month
